data.title: Data Collection
data.content: We collect personal information such as name, email address, and activity data to provide a better experience.

data.title: Data Usage
data.content: Your data is used to improve service functionality, customer support, and user experience personalization.

data.title: Third-Party Access
data.content: We do not share your personal data with third parties except as required by law or with your explicit consent.

data.title: Cookies Policy
data.content: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings at any time.

data.title: User Rights
data.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. If you wish to exercise these rights, please contact our privacy officer.
